title: Phase 4: Android client
description:
Mobile client targeting Android via Flutter + flutter_rust_bridge. nie-core compiles to native ARM, Flutter handles UI.

Required:
- flutter_rust_bridge bindings exposing nie-core API to Dart
- Cross-compile targets: aarch64-linux-android, armv7-linux-androideabi, x86_64-linux-android
- Flutter app structure: Chat, Contacts, Wallet, Settings screens
- Key backup UI: show seed phrase / QR code, import from backup
- Background service: persistent WebSocket connection, receive messages while app backgrounded
- Push notifications: APNs/FCM wake-up when background service is killed
- Consider QUIC/HTTP3 for mobile (frequent IP changes during LTE handoff)
- App store: F-Droid first (no Google tracking), Google Play optional

Blocking: MLS encryption (Phase 1) must be complete before Android client ships.
close_reason: Core Android/Flutter client delivered: chat, identity, relay, typing indicators, seed backup/restore, relay settings, message timestamps, auth hardening. Background service and advanced screens tracked separately.
